name: pandastack
description: Personal AI operator OS: skill-only stack with 25 skills organized into engineering / productivity / writing / meta buckets under skills/, tiered via manifest.toml. Covers dev / writing / knowledge lifecycles with a review-and-ship learning loop, plus a skill-construction quality loop.

interface.shortDescription: Personal AI operator OS for lifecycle workflows: dev, writing, knowledge.
interface.longDescription: Use Pandastack to guide work through dev, writing, and knowledge lifecycles with skills for careful gates, review, ship, knowledge extraction, parallel research, retros, and a self-evolving learning loop.
defaultPrompt: I want to start a new feature.
Let's review and ship this branch.
Help me close out this knowledge note.
